title: Source / quote attribution
description: Per-story output of the source-attribution Claude pass: every direct quote in today's corpus with the speaker, role, attributive verb, and stance toward the story's target. PR 3 / meta-v8.3.0 added the speaker_affiliation_bucket + speaker_affiliation_kind fields so quotes can be aggregated by the *organization* the speaker speaks for, not just the individual role (speaker_type).

speaker_name.description: Proper name (no titles), or null for unnamed speakers.

role_or_affiliation.description: Institutional role at time of quotation, or descriptor for civilians.

speaker_affiliation_bucket.description: Organizational/institutional category. Distinct from speaker_type — captures the org rather than the role. Enables per-affiliation aggregation in source_aggregation.py.

speaker_affiliation_kind.description: Free-text specifier of the organization (e.g. 'US Executive Branch', 'Brookings Institution'). Null for civilian / unknown buckets where no organization applies.

exact_quote.description: Verbatim from corpus[signal_text_idx].signal_text. Validator rejects hallucinations.

attributive_verb.description: Lemma form of the verb (said / claimed / warned / etc.).
